summary: 🚀 v1.4 Development IN PROGRESS - AI Decision Path Visualization backend COMPLETE. Backend: 3 API endpoints implemented + 4 new tests (all 29 tests passing, 100% success rate). Frontend components pending. Expected completion: 2 iterations.

v1_4_development.market_justification: Addresses researchers & AI ethicists segment (10% market). Enables transparency into AI decision-making processes.
v1_4_development.current_phase: Phase 1: Database & API (Complete) / Phase 2-4: Frontend & Testing (Pending)

components: ✅ AIDecisionPath ORM Model (with JSON storage for reasoning steps, candidates, final decision, key factors)
✅ Pydantic Schemas (ReasoningStep, DecisionCandidate, FinalDecision, KeyFactor, AIDecisionPathCreate/Response/Summary)
✅ Database Integration (auto-created table with foreign key, indexes)
✅ 4 Comprehensive Tests (all passing: test_create_decision_path, test_get_decision_path, test_get_decision_path_not_found, test_get_decision_paths_history)

components_todo: ReasoningTimeline component (visual timeline of reasoning steps)
ConfidenceIndicator component (progress bar showing confidence score)
KeyFactorsChart component (Recharts bar chart for factor weights)

features_complete: ✅ Voice Input (Web Audio API + Web Speech API)
